titles.ar: باب مَنِ اشْتَرَى طَعَامَ قَوْمٍ وَ هُمْ لَهُ كَارِهُونَ
titles.en: Chapter 104 – The one who buys the food of a people and they are compelled to it

titles.ar: باب مَنِ اشْتَرَى طَعَامَ قَوْمٍ وَ هُمْ لَهُ كَارِهُونَ
titles.en: Chapter 104 – The one who buys the food of a people and they are compelled to it

segments: مَنِ اشْتَرَى طَعَامَ قَوْمٍ وَ هُمْ لَهُ كَارِهُونَ قُصَّ لَهُمْ مِنْ لَحْمِهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ .
arabic.text: مَنِ اشْتَرَى طَعَامَ قَوْمٍ وَ هُمْ لَهُ كَارِهُونَ قُصَّ لَهُمْ مِنْ لَحْمِهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Ali Bin Uqba, from Al Husayn Bin Musa, from Bureyd and Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who buys the food of a people and they are compelled to it (dislike to sell it), it would be clipped for them from his flesh on the Day of Judgement’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Ali Bin Uqba, from Al Husayn Bin Musa, from Bureyd and Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who buys the food of a people and they are compelled to it (dislike to sell it), it would be clipped for them from his flesh on the Day of Judgement’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Ali ibn ‘Uqbah from al-Husayn ibn Musa from Burayd and Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one buys the foodstuff of a people who dislike such purchase, on the Day of Judgment it will be recovered for them from his flesh.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Ali ibn ‘Uqbah from al-Husayn ibn Musa from Burayd and Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one buys the foodstuff of a people who dislike such purchase, on the Day of Judgment it will be recovered for them from his flesh.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/271)
gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/271)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عُقْبَةَ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
